description: Crafted from soft premium leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this wallet from hidekraft makes for a perfect addition to your handbag. Height: 9 cm Width: 20 cm Soft leather for suppleness and easy stretchability Main zippered compartment in the centre with a separator and fabric lining Zippered compartment inside the main compartment A compartment with a flap and clasp button closure on the front with card holders, two pockets and a zippered compartment A compartment at the back with clasp button closure and two mesh fabric pockets Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
